task: Slide the silver pot in front of the canned goods on the other side of the chocolate.
raw:
**SCENE ANALYSIS -** A stainless steel pot sits on a wooden countertop. A blue-handled utensil is to the right of the pot. The task is to slide the pot to the other side of the chocolate bar. The pot is a rigid container with a flat base, suitable for sliding. The chocolate bar is a small, rectangular object on the right side of the scene. The goal is to move the pot from its current position to the left side of the chocolate bar, ensuring it is stable and not obstructing the chocolate. **STRATEGY -** First, reach for the pot to grasp it. Then, slide it horizontally to the left until it is positioned to the left of the chocolate bar. Ensure the pot is stable and not in contact with the chocolate. **AFFORDANCE REASONING -** Step 1: Reach for the pot to grasp it. The pot's body is the appropriate affordance region for grasping. Step 2: Grasp the pot by its body for a secure hold. Step 3: Transport the pot horizontally to the left. The destination is an empty area on the countertop to the left of the chocolate bar. Step 4: Place the pot in the new position, ensuring it is stable and not obstructing the chocolate.

Goal: on(pot, countertop); stable(pot); left_of(pot, chocolate_bar)
Scene: pot, chocolate_bar, countertop, utensil
Step 1: reach(pot)
  affordance_region: the body of the pot
  contact: gripper_state(open) [progress]
  spatial: distance(gripper, pot, <, 0.03) [completion]
  direction: approach_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: distance(gripper, pot) < 0.03
Step 2: grasp(pot)
  affordance_region: the body of the pot
  contact: holding(pot) [completion]
  direction: grasp_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: holding(pot)
Step 3: transport(pot -> left_of(chocolate_bar))
  affordance_region: an empty area on the countertop to the left of the chocolate bar
  spatial: left_of(pot, chocolate_bar) [completion]
  safety: no_contact(pot, chocolate_bar)
  done_when: left_of(pot, chocolate_bar)
Step 4: place(pot -> left_of(chocolate_bar))
  affordance_region: an empty area on the countertop to the left of the chocolate bar
  contact: surface_contact(pot, countertop) [completion]; released(pot) [completion]
  pose: stable(pot) [completion]
  done_when: surface_contact(pot, countertop) AND released(pot) AND stable(pot)
<END_OF_PLAN>

steps.affordance_region: an empty area on the countertop to the left of the chocolate bar
an empty area on the countertop to the left of the chocolate bar
steps.done_when: surface_contact(pot, countertop) AND released(pot) AND stable(pot)
